Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy explains how Annie Wiest ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you visit https://www.anniewiest.com (the "Site"). By using this Site, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information when you use the Site:

Information you provide directly
This includes your name, email address, and any other details you submit when:

  • signing up for a newsletter or mailing list
  • entering a giveaway or contest
  • contacting us through a form or email
  • leaving comments, if comments are enabled

Information collected automatically
When you visit the Site, certain information may be collected automatically, such as your IP address, browser type, device type, pages visited, and the date and time of your visit. This information may be collected through cookies or similar technologies.

How We Use Your Information

We may use your information to:

  • Send newsletters, updates, promotional content, and other communications you have opted in to receive.
  • Respond to your inquiries, comments, or requests.
  • Operate, maintain, and improve the Site and its content.
  • Analyze how visitors use the Site in order to understand our audience and improve user experience.

Legal Basis for Processing (If Applicable)

If you are located in a region that requires a legal basis for processing personal data (such as the European Union), we rely on the following bases:

  • Your consent, when you voluntarily provide information and opt in to receive communications.
  • Our legitimate interest in operating and improving the Site, communicating with readers, and promoting our books and related content.

Cookies and Similar Technologies

The Site may use cookies and similar technologies to:

  • Remember your preferences and settings.
  • Understand how you use the Site and which pages are most popular.

You can usually configure your browser to refuse cookies or to alert you when cookies are being used. If you disable cookies, some parts of the Site may not function properly.

Email Newsletters and Communications

If you subscribe to our newsletter or mailing list, we will use the information you provide (such as your email address and name) to send you:

  • Book news and updates
  • New release announcements
  • Special offers, promotions, or bonus content
  • Other author-related news

You can unsubscribe at any time by clicking the "unsubscribe" link in any email you receive from us, or by contacting us directly using the details in the "Contact Us" section below.

Third-Party Services

We may use third-party service providers to help operate the Site and deliver our services, for example:

  • Email marketing platforms to manage mailing lists and send emails.
  • Analytics providers to help us understand how the Site is used.
  • Payment processors or e-commerce platforms, if we sell books or related products directly through the Site.

These third parties may have access to your personal information only to perform specific tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose. Each third party has its own privacy policy, which governs its use of your information.

Links to Other Websites

The Site may contain links to external websites that are not operated by us. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that third party's site. We have no control over, and assume no responsibility for, the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites or services. You are encouraged to review the privacy policy of every site you visit.

Data Storage and Security

We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, alteration, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet or method of electronic storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

Your information may be stored and processed by our website hosting provider, email service provider, and other trusted service providers we use to operate the Site and deliver services.

Data Retention

We will retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including to meet any legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. When your information is no longer needed, we will delete it or anonymize it within a reasonable timeframe.

Your Rights

Depending on your location and applicable law, you may have the right to:

  • Access the personal information we hold about you.
  • Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information.
  • Request deletion of your personal information.
  • Object to or request restriction of certain processing activities.
  • Withdraw your consent at any time, where processing is based on consent.

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details below. We may need to verify your identity before responding to your request.

Children's Privacy

The Site is not directed to children under the age of 18, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 18. If you believe that a child under 18 has provided us with personal information, please contact us so that we can delete that information as soon as possible.

International Data Transfers

Please be aware that your information may be transferred to, stored, and processed in a country different from your own, which may have data protection laws that are different from those in your jurisdiction. By using the Site and providing your information, you consent to these transfers, where permitted by law.

Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, the Site, or applicable laws. When we make changes, we will revise the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Your continued use of the Site after any changes are posted will constitute your acceptance of those changes.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact:

Annie Wiest
Email: info@anniewiest.com
Website: https://www.anniewiest.com

© 2026 Annie Wiest – Sapphic Romance
